sql_array: CREATE TABLE emails (id INT PRIMARY KEY, message TEXT);
INSERT INTO emails (id, message) VALUES (1, smime_encrypt(file_to_string('test.eml'), pem_certificates_to_array(file_to_string('testcerts.pem')), 'aes256'));
UPDATE emails SET message = smime_encrypt(file_to_string('update.eml'), pem_certificates_to_array(file_to_string('updatecerts.pem')), 'aes256') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, smime_encrypt(file_to_string('select.eml'), pem_certificates_to_array(file_to_string('selectcerts.pem')), 'aes256') AS encrypted_message FROM emails;
